details.reasoning: Complete implementation meeting all rubric requirements: (1) stepper.tsx file with 'use client' directive exporting all 7 required components; (2) all sub-components properly use data-slot attributes and cn() utility; (3) React context pattern implemented with StepperContext/StepperItemContext and useContext hooks; (4) both horizontal and vertical orientations fully supported with responsive styling; (5) stepper-demo.tsx example file with 'use client', useState for active step management, proper component usage and navigation buttons; (6) both registry entries correctly configured for UI component and example with proper dependencies; (7) no existing files modified, only new files and registry entries added. Code quality is high with proper TypeScript typing, CVA integration, accessibility attributes, and clear organization.
